name: Medium Investigation
description: Figures conferring over evidence, searching a space, piecing together a narrative.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Figures comb through the silence, each finding pulling the picture tighter.
{setting}. Two minds circulate the same question, neither ready to say it aloud.
{setting}. The space yields its secrets slowly, one detail at a time.

1: {subject}, center frame, facing away from camera at a slight angle.
2: {subject}, left third of frame, facing right.
{subject}, right third of frame, facing left.
3: {subject}, left third of frame, facing right, foreground.
{subject}, right third of frame, facing left, slightly further from lens.
4: {subject}, far left of frame, facing right, foreground.
{subject}, far right of frame, facing left, furthest from lens.

background_pool: Low-lit room with deep teal shadows, stacks of boxes and filing cabinets lining the walls
Warehouse interior with hanging industrial lamps casting pools of yellow light between long aisles
Night-time alley, wet cobblestones reflecting red and blue ambient light from distant sources
Library archive, floor-to-ceiling shelves fading into gloom, a single green-shaded desk lamp burning
action_pool: Head lowered, eyes scanning slowly side to side
Chin resting on one hand, elbow supported
torso twisted slightly, reaching downward with extended arm
Shoulders hunched forward, weight shifted onto one foot
One arm extended, index finger pointing
Leaning forward at the waist, neck craned
Head turned to face the other figure, mouth open
Both hands clasped behind the back
Squatting low, knees bent, back straight
Arms crossed tight against the chest, chin dipped
